tagline: Built in Texas. Tested for the Toughest Environments.
intro: The next generation of ESAB engine-driven welders — a lightweight, compact, and powerful combination of generator and multiprocess welder, engineered to deliver where the grid ends.

features.title: 270A at 100% Duty Cycle
features.description: Delivers a full 270 amps of welding output at 100% duty cycle — sustained, all-day power without thermal cutout on the most demanding job sites.

features.title: 11 kW Generator Output
features.description: Peak output of 11 kW across multiple 120VAC and 240VAC outlets. Run grinders, compressors, lights, plasma cutters, and additional welders simultaneously.

features.title: 23.5 HP Kohler® Engine
features.description: Powered by the proven Kohler® Command Pro CH730 gasoline engine — made in America, built for harsh construction environments and reliable starts.

features.title: Versatile Power Outlets
features.description: 4× 120VAC 20A GFCI receptacles, one 240VAC (6-50R) dedicated outlet, and a 120/240V hybrid outlet — all circuit-breaker protected with rubber covers.

features.title: True Multiprocess Capability
features.description: Handles SMAW (Stick), GTAW (TIG), GMAW (MIG), FCAW (Flux-Core), and CAC-A (Carbon Arc Gouging) — one machine for every process on the job site.

features.title: Next-Generation Inverter
features.description: Proprietary inverter technology delivers easy arc starts across all welding modes, with synergic lines for fast setup and best-in-class arc performance.

features.title: Advanced Arc Controls
features.description: Arc Force for Stick, Cables Calibration for MIG, and full synergic control — precise arc tuning including 6010/6011, 7018, and hardfacing electrodes.

features.title: Carbon Arc Gouging
features.description: Capable of carbon arc gouging with 3/16 in. carbons — for cutting, removing, and preparing metal on the job site.

features.title: 7" TFT Color Display
features.description: Large, high-contrast 7-inch display with intuitive menus and advanced HMI — readable at distance in direct sunlight. Optimizes welds through accurate software control.

features.title: Synergic Setup
features.description: Synergic lines automate welding parameter relationships — dial in wire, gas, and material and the machine sets the optimal starting point. Fast, repeatable, consistent.

features.title: 100+ Customer-Requested Features
features.description: More than 100 features developed directly from field operator feedback — from the HMI design to process-specific fine-tuning controls.

features.title: Built and Tested in Texas
features.description: Assembled and tested in the USA. Engineered for the harshest construction, oil and gas, and mobile service environments.

features.title: Compact Truck & Trailer Ready
features.description: Small footprint and structural design engineered for truck-bed or trailer mounting — go anywhere the work takes you without leaving capability behind.

features.title: Simplified Maintenance
features.description: Full component visibility and precise parts replacement timing notifications — designed to extend equipment lifespan and minimize unplanned downtime in the field.
